name: MediLog - care
subtitle: Private meds and water log
description: MediLog helps you privately document medication intake, water, stock and notes. Free is a small trial mode; Premium adds family and care profiles, stock and refill management, export reports, QR/medication-plan import preparation, vault and reliable local reminders. The app stores data locally, uses no cloud sync and no tracking. StoreKit subscriptions are managed by Apple and can be cancelled at any time in App Store account settings. MediLog does not replace medical advice, does not diagnose and does not provide dosage or treatment recommendations. Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
promotionalText: Premium is clearer: family care, stock, export, vault and local reminders. Free stays a small trial mode.
whatsNew: MediLog 1.4 adds a clearer first-steps guide, makes medication cards, the day calendar, metrics and empty states directly actionable, and improves the Premium overview with clearer Free/Premium limits. Your health data stays local; MediLog still does not replace medical advice.
